name: MEST Africa Startup Program
eligibility: Early-stage founders in technology sectors including fintech, healthtech, edtech and commerce. MVP to early traction stages.

name: Google for Startups Accelerator: Africa
eligibility: Seed to Series A African startups using AI/ML and software innovation across industries.

name: Tony Elumelu Foundation Entrepreneurship Programme
eligibility: African entrepreneurs at idea, MVP, and early traction stages across all industries.

name: Seedstars World Competition
eligibility: High-growth startups at early stage to growth stage with scalable technology products.

name: African Development Foundation Grants
eligibility: Innovative African startups and SMEs with strong local economic impact and job creation potential.

name: Ghana Innovation Hub Challenge
eligibility: Ghana-based founders at validation, MVP, and growth stages in digital and innovation-focused industries.

name: Village Capital Future of Work Africa
eligibility: Africa startups with MVP or early traction in future of work, productivity, and fintech verticals.

name: MIT Solve Global Challenges
eligibility: Startups across stages building technology solutions for social and economic development challenges.
